channel.title: "jasmonic acid" on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments
channel.description: Recent content in "jasmonic acid" on DICE Lab: Diversity In Changing Environments

item.title: Trade-offs between constitutive and induced defences drive geographical and climatic clines in pine chemical defences
item.description: Abstract There is increasing evidence that geographic and climatic clines drive the patterns of plant defence allocation and defensive strategies.
